languages.text: "Будет исполнено незамедлительно, Ваша Светлость. Я приглашу корабельного священника и организую оцепление".
"It will be done without delay, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will summon the ship's chaplain to come and organise a cordon."
languages.original_text: "Будет исполнено незамедлительно, Ваша Светлость. Я приглашу корабельного священника и организую оцепление".

traits.locale_text: "It will be done without delay, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will summon the ship's chaplain to come and organise a cordon."
"It will be done without delay, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will summon the ship's chaplain to come and organise a cordon."
"It will be done without delay, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will summon the ship's chaplain to come and organise a cordon."
"It will be done without delay, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will summon the ship's chaplain to come and organise a cordon."

languages.text: 「すぐにいたします、御{mf|殿|殿}。船の牧師を呼び、封鎖の体制を整えます」
languages.original_text: "It will be done without delay, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will summon the ship's chaplain to come and organise a cordon."

traits.locale_text: 「すぐにいたします、御{mf|殿|殿}。船の牧師を呼び、封鎖の体制を整えます。」

languages.text: «Lo haremos de inmediato, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Llamaré al capellán para que organice un cordón protector».
languages.original_text: "It will be done without delay, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will summon the ship's chaplain to come and organise a cordon."

traits.locale_text: «Lo haremos de inmediato, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Llamaré al capellán para que organice un cordón protector».

languages.text: "Wird unverzüglich erledigt, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ich werde den Kaplan des Schiffs anweisen, ein Spalier zu bilden."
languages.original_text: "It will be done without delay, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will summon the ship's chaplain to come and organise a cordon."

traits.locale_text: "Wird unverzüglich erledigt, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ich werde den Kaplan des Schiffs anweisen, ein Spalier zu bilden."

languages.text: « Ce sera fait sur-le-champ, Votre Seigneurie. Je vais convoquer le chapelain du vaisseau afin qu'il mette en place un cordon. »
languages.original_text: "It will be done without delay, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will summon the ship's chaplain to come and organise a cordon."

traits.locale_text: « Ce sera fait sur-le-champ, Votre Seigneurie. Je vais convoquer le chapelain du vaisseau afin qu'il mette en place un cordon. »

languages.text: “立即执行，大人。我这就召集随舰牧师前来，并组织警戒。”
languages.original_text: "It will be done without delay, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will summon the ship's chaplain to come and organise a cordon."

traits.locale_text: “立即执行，大人。我这就召集随舰牧师前来，并组织警戒。”

languages.text: "Gecikmeden yapılacak {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Gemi vaizini çağırıp bir kordon oluşturmasını sağlayacağım."
languages.original_text: "It will be done without delay, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will summon the ship's chaplain to come and organise a cordon."

traits.locale_text: "Gecikmeden yapılacak {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Gemi vaizini çağırıp bir kordon oluşturmasını sağlayacağım."
